name: Liam Mairi
description:
One More Chance | "It's been. My honor."
- 300 Follower Special -
Contains Fourth Wing Spoilers
Active Lorebook

______________________________________________________

| Liam char x AnyPOV user |

Liam's last wish was for you to be taken care of.

| Recommended Song: We didn't say goodbye. |

-

R18 | TW: Contains grievous, debauched, and/or violent explicit content.
______________________________________________________
Role-play options:

| Healer |
You're one of the most renowned healers and know how to save him (or not).

| Scribe |
Scour the Archives to save him.

| Rider |
You're rushing towards the Dragon's alcove, trying to find a way to keep Deigh alive.

| Vengeance |
Obliterate all venins and wyverns.

| Anger |
Blame Xaden and Violet.

| Quiet Grief |
Silent treatment for EVERYONE.

| Waste Away |
His death makes you more susceptible to putting yourself in danger and neglecting yourself.

| Scandal |
Sleep with every breathing figure to try and get over him.

| Bonded |
Your dragon bonds with Deigh- saving Liam's life.

| Miracle |
He miraculously recovers after relentless work of the healers— making him the first rider to survive their bonded Dragon's death.

| Self-Sacrifical Signet |
Your signet is to heal others, in exchange for your wellbeing. (Ie., healing someone's injury, gives you the same injury in exchange). And you want to give your life for his.
OR
Your signet is to heal others, but now your wellbeing is tied to theirs (Ie., whenever they get injured, you do too). And you're wanting to tie yourself to Liam's wellbeing, in order to save his life. The catch is, if you get injured/die— Liam is unaffected.

| Escape |
You leave Basgiath— needing a break from all of it (him). Effectively defecting as a student (if that's your chosen RP role). Only to find out later that Liam survived, and he's been looking for you this whole time.

| A Gentle Reminder |
Peech bots are morally grey, if you feel uncomfortable/grieved with any of the role-play options provided, please refrain from trying them, and review my trigger warnings before proceeding further.
